app.name: Tenure
app.tag: Volunteering that pays you back in growth

role.hint: Prototype: switch roles to see every side

error.load: Something went wrong loading this view. Try Reset demo.

home.sub: Here is where your service stands.
home.noShift: No upcoming shifts. Find one in Discover.

checkin.title: Check in
checkin.geoExplain: We confirm you are on-site with a one-time location check. We store only "inside the area", never a location trail.
checkin.awaiting: Waiting for the supervisor to confirm your shift. Switch to the Organization view to sign it off.
checkin.approved: Verified. Your hours are logged and credits are minting.
checkin.rejected: This shift was not signed off, so no hours or credits were logged. You can register for another shift in Discover.
checkin.notFound: This check-in link is no longer valid.

passport.title: Your volunteer passport
passport.sub: One verified record that travels with you across organizations.
passport.attendanceStamp: Honest record of presence. Single sessions are marked "not assessed". Free for everyone.
passport.verifiedEmpty: Keep showing up at one organization to earn your first Verified Service Record.
passport.threshold: Earned at {{shifts}} shifts across {{weeks}} weeks with independent corroboration.
passport.progressTo: {{have}} of {{need}} shifts toward a Verified Service Record

credits.title: Learning credits
credits.sub: Earned from verified service. Spend them on growth, never on cash.
credits.how: Credits mint when your service is verified, sit in escrow, and become spendable once you earn a Verified Service Record. They are non-transferable and redeem only for learning.
credits.redeemed: Booked. The mentor will confirm a time.
credits.declined: That redemption is not available yet.

discover.title: Find a way to help
discover.sub: Real needs near you. Pick something you can come back to.

org.rosterSub: The volunteers you bring in, with their standing here.
org.signoffSub: Confirm who showed up and contributed. This is what mints credits.
org.rosterEmpty: No volunteers yet. They appear here once you bring them in.
org.shiftsSub: Add a shift to one of your opportunities.
org.errMissing: Fill in every field before creating the shift.
org.errPastDate: Pick a date from today onward.
org.errEndBeforeStart: End time must be after the start time.

mentor.sub: Sessions volunteers redeem with the credits they earned.

toast.crossed: Threshold crossed. Verified Service Record issued and credits vested.
toast.capExceeded: Monthly credit budget reached. Hours logged, credits paused.
toast.reset: Demo reset to its starting state
